title: Senaino: Educational Arduino UNO-inspired open hardware board with FT232 and CH340 variants
description: Senaino is an educational open hardware microcontroller board inspired by the Arduino UNO and adapted for SENAI classroom use in soldering, electronics and embedded programming training. This archive contains Eagle hardware sources, Gerber fabrication files, schematic exports, bills of materials, assembly documentation and testing notes for both FT232RL and CH340G USB-to-serial variants.
